Date tracking and management","errors":{"RequestKeyConflict(bool,uint40,uint40,bytes16,bytes16)":[{"details":"Occurs during a request where (`reqId` is reused and/or `seqNum` < expected) and the prior call had a different key (caller,seqNum,reqId) so replay does not occur as it otherwise could","params":{"isNewReqId":"true: `reqIdAct` is new; false: value was reused with a different (caller,seqNum)","reqIdAct":"Actual request id received","reqIdExp":"Expected request id, based upon cache lookup by (caller,seqNum); Zero-value if !`isNewReqId`","seqNumAct":"Actual sequence number received","seqNumExp":"Expected sequence number based upon caller"}}],"SeqNumGap(uint40,uint40,address)":[{"details":"Occurs when seq num `rcvd` > `expect`, possible causes: error from network/provider/client/reorg     - Invariant: `seqNum` must increment monotonically for a write call, see table above","params":{"caller":"Caller's address","seqNumAct":"Received sequence number","seqNumExp":"Expected sequence number"}}]},"events":{"ReqAck(bytes16,address,uint40,(bytes16,uint16,uint16,uint16,uint40,uint40),bool)":{"details":"A Request Acknowledgement Event occurs at the end of each request (if no revert) and bridges the gaps between data sources, clients, lossy/unreliable protocols/providers/neworks, and the on-chain call outcome - Captures 3 categories of data for off-chain calls:     - Key inputs (indexed params) allow a tx search via either:         - PK1: reqId: Allows a tx search on a single field such as to fill a gap on replay         - PK2: (caller,seqNum): Allows a tx search to audit a sequence for a caller     - Context: `replay` and `callRes.blockNum` provide context on when/where this happened     - Output: `callRes` provides fields (rc, lrc, count) for either a simple result or summary         - Additional results can be found in the tx receipt logs from prior events in the same tx","params":{"callRes":"See `CallRes`; `reqId` and `ReqAck` are separate params for indexes","caller":"Account initiating the tx","replay":"false for an original event, true when `reqId` was already processed","reqId":"From CallRes: Request ID, allows for gap-fill on replay","seqNum":"From CallRes: Caller's sequence number incremented monotonically"}}},"kind":"dev","methods":{},"version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"contract/v1_0/IEarnDateMgr.sol":"IEarnDateMgr"},"evmVersion":"prague","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":@openzeppelin/contracts-upgradeable/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable/contracts/",":@openzeppelin/contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/",":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/",":openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable/",":openzeppelin-contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"contract/v1_0/IBox.sol":{"keccak256":"0x0cb1871185189b052dca6d7125f5dc10aeb8e63e4e951bc810bbee1332da01b1","license":"UNLICENSED","urls":["bzz-raw://2d7233c0bcbcde728725c9c276e7aff7c3dcec23fae712d65f346fa8a1a8fcc2","dweb:/ipfs/QmYZBW6T7YvBpx77G2ofMcxJQok8k33y4TEjiHtL1UF7pD"]},"contract/v1_0/IBoxMgr.sol":{"keccak256":"0x498a8a127f2797f7a410131ea4f9523243eb68f0dc174c6a3bc8c7b6bc44f127","license":"UNLICENSED","urls":["bzz-raw://e54399624d7e1c0800281969c02e0d5814fb3d0b87fd6533ac27f40c2584b297","dweb:/ipfs/QmShLEa18RYudrEUx4NkT833RGm2e6NrRT7dL1SZg93U1G"]},"contract/v1_0/ICallTracker.sol":{"keccak256":"0x55771cf0eb77cd29635e23a90dfc280d8b0554cb41c381a93421b68a5deee866","license":"UNLICENSED","urls":["bzz-raw://b0054d759dd7137160a26d220a87be80bf49a2671d965e3b08784ac71147a630","dweb:/ipfs/QmaWsv7GQrWUdhEoK8prrZWiyXdQ8Cr1WSsMUEJV4RZ6jZ"]},"contract/v1_0/IContractUser.sol":{"keccak256":"0x683b44666bc96ca31da2561c64aee85a00633a80d86f18f558d54136c6792a4d","license":"UNLICENSED","urls":["bzz-raw://6821b8cebb01654f4655d911a3135813dead13f83f1952e45ea1d9abf51b08a9","dweb:/ipfs/Qmaka1bCq2fzeJwB6WKBEmXQkoV3wEAr9VQTSjTuKxSEoZ"]},"contract/v1_0/IEarnDateMgr.sol":{"keccak256":"0x045c1e8ef9123f95bac53a5a5b8a0fda7c85aea96bd9f8ec9378bafce1835402","license":"UNLICENSED","urls":["bzz-raw://7d97adc986c68078be493f020a2656bcc5b38d0db15e7f4cd
